descFull: Python CLI + UE plugin that lets Claude Code (AI coding agent) control Unreal Engine in real time. Spawn actors, edit blueprints, call functions, capture screenshots, manage PIE sessions, and more -- all from the terminal. Works with UE5 editor and packaged builds via an in-process HTTP bridge.
